capabilities.description: Category-based local package logging and Unity console forwarding.

exceptions.reason: Owns Unity console forwarding and sink validation.

capabilities.description: Shared editor chrome, icons, resources, style tokens, editor-only UI Toolkit helpers.
General HTTP/API request construction, transport, serialization, authentication, and cancellation.
Authenticated session lifecycle, restore, refresh, logout, and persistence contracts.
Object, scene, and AssetBundle loading lifecycle and handles.
Generic keyed repositories, selection state, and repository primitives.
UI routing, screens, channels, modals, guards, transitions, and back navigation.
Keyed world-object selection, hover tracking, raycast adapters, and highlight hooks.
Runtime palettes, theme assets, color roles, and UI theme adapters.
Diagnostics providers, snapshots, JSON export, overlays, and aggregation.
Package discovery, install/update/remove, channels, registry composition, and ecosystem visualization.
Catalog, category hierarchy, dependency metadata, Integration metadata, Suite metadata, and governance metadata.
Potential tiny shared UnityEngine.Object lifetime primitives if the dedicated audit justifies a Common package.
